RUNESMITH2-BALL_PEEN_HAMMER.description: Every time you play [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Skill|Skills} in a single turn, [gold]Enhance[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] at random.
RUNESMITH2-BALL_PEEN_HAMMER.title: Ball-peen Hammer
RUNESMITH2-BROKEN_RUBY.description: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]{Ignis}[/blue] {Ignis:rs2Icon(0)} and [gold]Enhance[/gold] [blue]{Cards:diff()}[/blue] card{Cards:plural:|s} in your [gold]Hand[/gold] at random.
RUNESMITH2-BROKEN_RUBY.title: Broken Ruby
RUNESMITH2-CORE_CRYSTAL.description: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]{Elements}[/blue] {Elements:rs2Icon(0)} and [gold]Enhance[/gold] ALL cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
RUNESMITH2-CORE_CRYSTAL.title: Core Crystal
RUNESMITH2-CRAFTING_MANUAL.description: At the start of each combat, put a random [gold]Recipe[/gold] card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
RUNESMITH2-CRAFTING_MANUAL.selectionScre: Put a [gold]Recipe[/gold] card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
RUNESMITH2-CRAFTING_MANUAL.title: Crafting Manual
RUNESMITH2-CRYSTALLIZED_RAINBOW.title: Crystallized Rainbow
RUNESMITH2-LIQUID_NITROGEN.description: At the start of your turn, apply [blue]{IceColdPower}[/blue] [gold]Ice-Cold[/gold] to ALL enemies.
RUNESMITH2-LIQUID_NITROGEN.title: Liquid Nitrogen
RUNESMITH2-NANOBOTS.description: A random card in each card reward is [gold]Enchanted[/gold] with [purple]Forged[/purple] [blue]{ForgedAmount}[/blue].
RUNESMITH2-NANOBOTS.title: Nanobots
RUNESMITH2-PLASMA_GLOBE.description: Runes are [gold]Crafted[/gold] with [blue]{PotencyAmount}[/blue] additional [gold]Potency[/gold] and [blue]{ChargeAmount}[/blue] additional [gold]Charge{ChargeAmount:plural:|s}[/gold].
RUNESMITH2-PLASMA_GLOBE.title: Plasma Globe
RUNESMITH2-RECYCLER.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Break[/gold] ALL your Runes with [blue]0[/blue] [gold]Charges[/gold] and gain {Elements:rs2Icon(0)} equal to their [gold]Recipe[/gold] cards total {Elements:rs2Icon(0)} cost.
RUNESMITH2-RECYCLER.title: Recycler
SEA_GLASS.RUNESMITH2-RUNESMITH2.title: Tempered Glass
